sub_pixel_system.notes: Not documented in available source material

special_mechanics.name: climbing
special_mechanics.description: Player character Lester can climb (demonstrated in level 1 when climbing out of pond)

special_mechanics.name: swimming
special_mechanics.description: Swimming sequences present with oxygen bar HUD indicator

special_mechanics.name: kicking
special_mechanics.description: Lester can kick at small creatures when unarmed

special_mechanics.name: rocking_interaction
special_mechanics.description: Situation-specific action to rock cage back and forth

tier_notes: T2 (empirical/qualitative) - Wikipedia source provides gameplay mechanics overview but no quantitative physics parameters. Movement is qualitatively described through control scheme (run, jump, attack) and level design examples, not numerical values.
